-- Define time_constructible: t(n) is time-constructible if there exists a TM that computes t(n) in O(t(n)) time
def time_constructible (t : ℕ → ℕ) : Prop :=
  ∃ (M : ℕ → ℕ) (c : ℕ), -- M is a "TM" that computes t, c is the constant in O(t(n))
    ∀ n : ℕ, M n = t n ∧ M n ≤ c * t n

theorem pigeonhole_principle_cardinality_injection {α β : Type*} [Fintype α] [Fintype β] (h : Fintype.card α > Fintype.card β) : ¬∃ (f : α → β), Function.Injective f := by
  intro h_exists
  obtain ⟨f, hf⟩ := h_exists
  have h_le : Fintype.card α ≤ Fintype.card β := Fintype.card_le_o
